creator: vovkasm@gmail.com
text:
Thanks for patch, but already done by pr: ports/143693

On Thu, Feb 11, 2010 at 04:53, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of www/p5-Catalyst-Model-Adaptor,
>
> Please note that PR ports/143776 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/143776
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>



--=20
-- vovkasm
